featuredApps.name: CARE ABDM
featuredApps.description: ABDM (Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission) integration plugin for CARE. Enables ABHA number linking, consent management, and health information exchange with the Indian national health ecosystem.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_abdm_fe for development and manual testing.

featuredApps.name: CARE Imports
featuredApps.description: Bulk data import and export plugin for CARE. Helps hospital administrators set up facilities by importing users, departments, locations, medications, lab tests, and more from CSV files with validation and review workflows.

standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_imports_fe for development and manual testing.

featuredApps.name: CARE Scribe
featuredApps.description: AI-powered medical scriber for clinical documentation. Uses LLM technology to assist healthcare providers with structured medical data entry and clinical notes.

featuredApps.name: CARE TeleICU Devices
featuredApps.description: TeleICU Devices MFE Plug for CARE. Enables integration with Gateway, ONVIF Cameras, and Vitals Observation Devices (HL7 Monitors) for remote ICU monitoring.
